note: Local demonstrator benchmark. Official free/demo competitor downloads were captured where available. Portable/CLI tools were executed; proprietary GUI installers are recorded with hashes/signatures but are not scored until a scripted or manual VM run produces verifiable output.
privacy: The static site publishes commands, versions, damage classes, and outcomes only. Raw corpus bytes and absolute local paths are not included in this artifact.

tool_versions.python: Python 3.12.13 from the bundled local runtime
tool_versions.qpdf: qpdf 12.3.2, downloaded from the official GitHub release

local_direct_competitor_probe.meaning: No direct competitor binary was initially available on PATH. qpdf 12.3.2 was then downloaded as a portable official release and executed locally. Proprietary GUI installers were downloaded and fingerprinted, but not scored as executed because no documented scripted repair interface was available in this lab.

methodology: Run VERAQIS on synthetic damaged lab files and record only emitted recovery/provenance summaries.
Run baseline parsers in read/list/decompress mode against the same damaged files.
Download official free/demo competitor binaries into target/competitor-lab, record file size, SHA-256, Authenticode status, version metadata, and source URL.
Execute only portable/CLI tools that can be reproduced without GUI interaction or installation side effects.
Treat baseline listing as parser access only, not as a proof-carrying repair.
Do not score proprietary GUI tools until the exact binary, version, license state, corpus, output, and verifier procedure are recorded.

direct_competitors.name: DiskInternals ZIP Repair
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Scans damaged ZIP files, restores archive structure, and extracts intact files into a new archive.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct ZIP competitor; reviewed page did not expose a proof-carrying certificate or false-output gate.

direct_competitors.name: DataNumen Zip Repair
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Repairs corrupt or damaged ZIP files and recovers as much data as possible.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Compare on verified bytes, abstentions, and replayable provenance rather than broad recovery wording.

direct_competitors.name: DataNumen Archive Repair
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Archive recovery suite for corrupt ZIP, RAR, Unix TAR, and CAB archives.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct archive-suite competitor across VERAQIS archive formats; needs corpus run before any win/loss claim.

direct_competitors.name: WinZip repair / wzzip -yf
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Documents a command-line repair flow for corrupted ZIP files using WinZip Command Line.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct ZIP baseline candidate once exact WinZip and command-line versions are installed.

direct_competitors.name: SysTools ZIP Repair
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Scans, previews, and extracts from corrupted ZIP files.
direct_competitors.local_lab_status: downloaded; demo preview-only, GUI run not automated
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct ZIP competitor; compare previewable output against verified recovered bytes.

direct_competitors.name: BitRecover ZIP Repair Wizard
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Repairs corrupt ZIP files with a free demo; demo shows recovered file names only.
direct_competitors.local_lab_status: downloaded; demo preview-only, GUI run not automated
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct ZIP competitor; a scored comparison needs saved output, not only previewed filenames.

direct_competitors.name: RecoveryTools Zip Repair
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Repairs corrupted, damaged, broken, CRC-error, large, and batch ZIP archives into a healthy ZIP file.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct ZIP competitor; demo/full limitations should be captured before scored comparison.

direct_competitors.name: ZIP Recovery Kit / Recovery Toolbox
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Demo opens damaged ZIP files for preview; unregistered users cannot save recovered data.
direct_competitors.local_lab_status: downloaded; demo cannot save output without license
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct ZIP competitor; preview-only demo output is not comparable to verified recovered bytes.

direct_competitors.name: Remo Repair ZIP
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Official page located but crawler received a verification gate instead of reviewable product text.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct ZIP/ZIPX competitor; keep in the lab plan, but do not quote claims until source or binary is captured.

direct_competitors.name: OfficeRecovery Online
direct_competitors.direct_overlap: ZIP, Office, PDF, image and database repair
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Upload-based repair for corrupted files that native apps cannot open.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct online competitor; VERAQIS differentiates with offline operation and local evidence artifacts.

direct_competitors.name: Stellar Repair for Excel / Toolkit
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Claims Excel object recovery, preview, batch repair, and toolkit coverage for Word, PowerPoint, and PDF.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct Office repair competitor; compare against VERAQIS OPC verified parts and graph-proofed object recovery.

direct_competitors.name: DataNumen Office Repair
direct_competitors.direct_overlap: Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Access, Outlook repair
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Lists repair/recovery tools for corrupt Microsoft Office and database files.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct Office-suite competitor; VERAQIS should report per-part proof, not a single broad recovery percentage.

direct_competitors.name: Microsoft Office Open and Repair
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Open and Repair might recover a damaged document, workbook, or presentation.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Important native-app baseline for OPC/OOXML; should be run in a dedicated lab VM.

direct_competitors.name: DataNumen PDF Repair
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Repairs corrupt or damaged PDF files and recovers pages, images, fonts, and other elements.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct PDF competitor; compare graph-verified objects separately from orphan objects.

direct_competitors.name: iLovePDF Repair PDF
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Online repair of corrupt PDF files with partial or complete recovery depending on damage.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct online PDF competitor; VERAQIS keeps files local and exposes object-level provenance.

direct_competitors.name: PDF24 Repair PDF
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: Browser-based PDF repair, defect repair, and partial recovery when not all pages are repairable.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct online PDF competitor; VERAQIS should win on offline operation and explicit verified/orphan split.

direct_competitors.name: qpdf
direct_competitors.public_claim_summary: qpdf --check can attempt recovery and then operate on the recovered file.
direct_competitors.veraqis_comparison_point: Direct open-source PDF baseline. On the same damaged PDF, qpdf reconstructed a rewritten PDF with warnings; VERAQIS still reports object-level provenance and verified/orphan split.

downloaded_competitor_lab.name: qpdf
downloaded_competitor_lab.result: qpdf --check and qpdf input output both exited 3 with warnings on the damaged PDF, reconstructed the cross-reference table, and wrote an 11,429-byte PDF. qpdf --check on the rewritten output exited 0; pypdf opened the output and counted 10 pages.
downloaded_competitor_lab.proof_note: qpdf emits parser/check diagnostics, not a VERAQIS-style PCC certificate or per-object verified/orphan provenance split.

downloaded_competitor_lab.name: DiskInternals ZIP Repair
downloaded_competitor_lab.result: GUI/freeware executable downloaded and fingerprinted. No documented headless repair interface was found on the official page, so no scripted output was produced.
downloaded_competitor_lab.proof_note: Pending manual or VM run with saved output and independent verification.

veraqis_result.summary: 26 objects recovered, 25 graph-verified, 1 orphan; 10 pages/streams exported
veraqis_result.provenance: PDF Root/object graph proof; orphan separated from verified objects; report emitted

qpdf 12.3.2.detail: qpdf --check and qpdf input output exited 3 with warnings on the damaged input, reconstructed the cross-reference table, wrote an 11,429-byte PDF, and qpdf --check on the output exited 0; pypdf opened 10 pages.
qpdf 12.3.2.evidence: parser/check output only; no VERAQIS-style PCC or per-object verified/orphan split
